scenarios.name: Live: Google Flights cheapest 10 (YYZ→HKG, Jul 1)
scenarios.task: Find one-way flights from Toronto (YYZ) to Hong Kong (HKG) on July 1st, 2026. Search Google Flights. From the results, list the TOP 10 CHEAPEST flights. For each, report: airline, departure time, arrival time, number of stops, duration, and price in CAD. Sort by price ascending (cheapest first). Present the final answer as a clear numbered list. If you cannot access or read the results page after reasonable attempts, say so explicitly and report what you observed.
